posts.author: Amit2saxena
posts.text: Notes from IG Petro Q# and Q4 FY26 concall Q3 FY26 Concall (IG Petrochemicals) Lower margins driven by lower realization of PAN, High cost inventory and Lower realization of Malaic acid. Malaic is generally sold at 30% + price of PAN, during last 9 months, the prices of MAN are 30% below PAN. The reason of low MAN prices is excess capacity created by chinese players. Current MAN prices are $700 per ton, down from $1000, 9 months back. MAN is used in single use plastics / biodegradable plastics, but chinese government is yet to enforece it, hence chinese players are selling MAN in international…
